body:
Namaste Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy, Malviya Nagar se baat kar rahe hain. Aapke metformin, atorvastatin aur telmisartan ka last refill 26 March ko hua tha, aur stock 28 April tak khatam hone wala hai. Aapke health check-up aur medicine continuity ke liye yeh timely refill zaroori hai, kyunki aise regular medicines mein gap se risk ho sakta hai.

Aap senior citizen hain, toh aapke liye 15% OFF ka offer active hai. Iske saath, ₹499 se upar ke order par Free Home Delivery bhi milega—aapke saved address par directly. Don't let these potential health gaps happen; abhi refill kara ke medicine stock maintain rakhein.

Kya aapko hum kal, 29 April ko, ya aapki preferred date par delivery chahiye? Reply 1 for 29 April, 2 for 30 April, ya apna time batao.
rationale: Customer follow-up for follow-up visit anchored on payload facts. | Single-Pass Optimized (3.9s)
